                    <path id="loading-line-bkgd" d="M0,0 L150,0" fill="none" stroke="#F3F2F1" stroke-width="150"></path>
                    <style>
                        #loading-line-main {
                            stroke-dasharray: 150;
                            stroke-dashoffset: 150;
                        }
                        @keyframes animateLine {
                            to {
                                stroke-dashoffset: 0;
                            }
                        }
                        #loading-line-main {
                            animation: animateLine 2s linear infinite;
                        }
                    </style>

posted","employerLastReviewed":null,"employerResponsiveCardModel":null,"numOfCandidates":null,"postedToday":false,"recurringHireText":null,"urgentlyHiringModel":null},"hostQueryExecutionResult":{"data":{"jobData":{"__typename":"JobDataPayload","results":[{"__typename":"JobDataResult","trackingKey":"5-cmh1-3-1jo98baau222dh00","job":{"__typename":"Job","key":"25751d30a508d830","title":"Senior Software Engineer - Query Processing, Aurora DSQL","sourceEmployerName":"Amazon Development Center U.S., Inc.","datePublished":1747717200000,"expired":false,"language":"en","normalizedTitle":"senior engineer","refNum":"2987643-ee2afd3e","expirationDate":1779256800000,"sponsoredEmployerKey":null,"tracking":{"__typename":"JobTrackingResult","jobClick":{"__typename":"JobTrackingJobClickResult","url":"http:\u002F\u002Fwww.indeed.com\u002Frc\u002Fclk?jk=25751d30a508d830&bb=n_m7OomcQ0Znb8bQHhSkXFwTbmSYgyK3f70jBUAwB1sO_TLo7TNW7hsZVWe1yk3Eh1uV342Bc83ughJKfy6_wx5JoA1XJO1m&xkcb=SoA567M3jJYikMyEaZ0LbzkdCdPP"}},"source":{"__typename":"JobSource","key":"AAAAAe5G2WkuahF7qJynURHWt0tLlt1h7ttMwiNrDq0xJ6T66tnIzA==","name":"Amazon.com"},"feed":{"__typename":"JobFeed","key":"AAAAAYu6SdcqLvYb6zHYQnwb6ngpuOSwK6Q4KOjGJgl72EB4f+b09w==","isDradis":false,"feedSourceType":"EMPLOYER"},"url":"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.amazon.jobs\u002Fjobs\u002F2987643\u002Fsenior-software-engineer--query-processing-aurora-dsql?cmpid=DA_INAD200785B","dateOnIndeed":1778424893664,"description":{"__typename":"JobDescription","html":"\u003Cdiv>\u003Ch2 class=\"jobSectionHeader\">\u003Cb>DESCRIPTION\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fh2>\u003Cp>\nAmazon Aurora DSQL is a serverless, distributed SQL database with virtually unlimited scale, highest availability, and zero infrastructure management. Aurora DSQL provides active-active high availability, providing strong data consistency designed for 99.99% single-Region and 99.999% multi-Region availability. Aurora DSQL automatically manages and scales system resources, so you don't have to worry about maintenance downtime and provisioning, patching, or upgrading infrastructure.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nWe are seeking an engineer to enhance the query optimization and execution layer of Aurora DSQL. The role focuses on designing and implementing query optimization algorithms, cost-based optimization strategies, and core execution engine improvements. The ideal candidate has deep experience with database system internals and query optimizer architectures.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nAWS Utility Computing (UC) provides product innovations &mdash; from foundational services such as Amazon&rsquo;s Simple Storage Service (S3) and Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2), to consistently released new product innovations that continue to set AWS&rsquo;s services and features apart in the industry. As a member of the UC organization, you&rsquo;ll support the development and management of Compute, Database, Storage, Internet of Things (Iot), Platform, and Productivity Apps services in AWS, including support for customers who require specialized security solutions for their cloud services.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nKey job responsibilities\u003Cbr>\nOur engineers collaborate across diverse teams, projects, and environments to have a firsthand impact on our global customer base. You&rsquo;ll bring a passion for innovation, data, search, analytics, and distributed systems. You&rsquo;ll also:\u003Cbr>\nSolve challenging technical problems, often ones not solved before, at every layer of the stack.\u003Cbr>\nDesign, implement, test, deploy and maintain innovative software solutions to transform service performance, durability, cost, and security.\u003Cbr>\nBuild high-quality, highly available, always-on products.\u003Cbr>\nResearch implementations that deliver the best possible experiences for customers.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nA day in the life\u003Cbr>\nAs you design and code solutions to help our team drive efficiencies in software architecture, you&rsquo;ll create metrics, implement automation and other improvements, and resolve the root cause of software defects. You&rsquo;ll also:\u003Cbr>\nBuild high-impact solutions to deliver to our large customer base.\u003Cbr>\nParticipate in design discussions, code review, and communicate with internal and external stakeholders.\u003Cbr>\nWork cross-functionally to help drive business decisions with your technical input.\u003Cbr>\nWork in a startup-like development environment, where you&rsquo;re always working on the most important stuff.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nAbout the team\u003Cbr>\nOur team is dedicated to supporting new members. We have a broad mix of experience levels and tenures, and we&rsquo;re building an environment that celebrates knowledge-sharing and mentorship. Our senior members enjoy one-on-one mentoring and thorough, but kind, code reviews. We care about your career growth and strive to assign projects that help our team members develop your engineering expertise so you feel empowered to take on more complex tasks in the future.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nDiverse Experiences\u003Cbr>\nAWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn&rsquo;t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don&rsquo;t let it stop you from applying.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nAbout AWS\u003Cbr>\nAmazon Web Services (AWS) is the world&rsquo;s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating &mdash; that&rsquo;s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nInclusive Team Culture\u003Cbr>\nHere at AWS, it&rsquo;s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nWork\u002FLife Balance\u003Cbr>\nWe value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there&rsquo;s nothing we can&rsquo;t achieve in the cloud.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nMentorship &amp; Career Growth\u003Cbr>\nWe&rsquo;re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth&rsquo;s Best Employer. That&rsquo;s why you&rsquo;ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Ch2 class=\"jobSectionHeader\">\u003Cb>\u003Cbr>\nBASIC QUALIFICATIONS\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fh2>\u003Cul>\u003Cli>5+ years of non-internship professional software development experience\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>5+ years of programming with at least one software programming language experience\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>4+ years of leading design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>Experience as a mentor, tech lead or leading an engineering team\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>Strong background in database system internals and query processing fundamentals\u003C\u002Fli>\u003C\u002Ful>\u003Ch2 class=\"jobSectionHeader\">\u003Cb>\nPREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fh2>\u003Cul>\u003Cli>2+ years of experience with query optimizer architectures, cost based optimizers in OLTP database engines\u003C\u002Fli>\u003C\u002Ful>\u003Cbr>\nAmazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nLos Angeles County applicants: Job duties for this position include: work safely and cooperatively with other employees, supervisors, and staff; adhere to standards of excellence despite stressful conditions; communicate effectively and respectfully with employees, supervisors, and staff to ensure exceptional customer service; and follow all federal, state, and local laws and Company policies. Criminal history may have a direct, adverse, and negative relationship with some of the material job duties of this position. These include the duties and responsibilities listed above, as well as the abilities to adhere to company policies, exercise sound judgment, effectively manage stress and work safely and respectfully with others, exhibit trustworthiness and professionalism, and safeguard business operations and the Company&rsquo;s reputation. Pursuant to the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nOur inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https:\u002F\u002Famazon.jobs\u002Fcontent\u002Fen\u002Fhow-we-hire\u002Faccommodations for more information. If the country\u002Fregion you&rsquo;re applying in isn&rsquo;t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nOur compensation reflects the cost of labor across several US geographic markets. The base pay for this position ranges from $151,300\u002Fyear in our lowest geographic market up to $261,500\u002Fyear in our highest geographic market. Pay is based on a number of factors including market location and may vary depending on job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Amazon is a total compensation company. Dependent on the position offered, equity, sign-on payments, and other forms of compensation may be provided as part of a total compensation package, in addition to a full range of medical, financial, and\u002For other benefits. For more information, please visit https:\u002F\u002Fwww.aboutamazon.com\u002Fworkplace\u002Femployee-benefits. This position will remain posted until filled. Applicants should apply via our internal or external career site.\u003C\u002Fdiv>","text":"DESCRIPTION\n\nAmazon Aurora DSQL is a serverless, distributed SQL database with virtually unlimited scale, highest availability, and zero infrastructure management. Aurora DSQL provides active-active high availability, providing strong data consistency designed for 99.99% single-Region and 99.999% multi-Region availability. Aurora DSQL automatically manages and scales system resources, so you don't have to worry about maintenance downtime and provisioning, patching, or upgrading infrastructure.\n\nWe are seeking an engineer to enhance the query optimization and execution layer of Aurora DSQL. The role focuses on designing and implementing query optimization algorithms, cost-based optimization strategies, and core execution engine improvements. The ideal candidate has deep experience with database system internals and query optimizer architectures.\n\nAWS Utility Computing (UC) provides product innovations — from foundational services such as Amazon’s Simple Storage Service (S3) and Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2), to consistently released new product innovations that continue to set AWS’s services and features apart in the industry. As a member of the UC organization, you’ll support the development and management of Compute, Database, Storage, Internet of Things (Iot), Platform, and Productivity Apps services in AWS, including support for customers who require specialized security solutions for their cloud services.\n\nKey job responsibilities\nOur engineers collaborate across diverse teams, projects, and environments to have a firsthand impact on our global customer base. You’ll bring a passion for innovation, data, search, analytics, and distributed systems. You’ll also:\nSolve challenging technical problems, often ones not solved before, at every layer of the stack.\nDesign, implement, test, deploy and maintain innovative software solutions to transform service performance, durability, cost, and security.\nBuild high-quality, highly available, always-on products.\nResearch implementations that deliver the best possible experiences for customers.\n\nA day in the life\nAs you design and code solutions to help our team drive efficiencies in software architecture, you’ll create metrics, implement automation and other improvements, and resolve the root cause of software defects. You’ll also:\nBuild high-impact solutions to deliver to our large customer base.\nParticipate in design discussions, code review, and communicate with internal and external stakeholders.\nWork cross-functionally to help drive business decisions with your technical input.\nWork in a startup-like development environment, where you’re always working on the most important stuff.\n\nAbout the team\nOur team is dedicated to supporting new members. We have a broad mix of experience levels and tenures, and we’re building an environment that celebrates knowledge-sharing and mentorship. Our senior members enjoy one-on-one mentoring and thorough, but kind, code reviews. We care about your career growth and strive to assign projects that help our team members develop your engineering expertise so you feel empowered to take on more complex tasks in the future.\n\nDiverse Experiences\nAWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.\n\nAbout AWS\nAmazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.\n\nInclusive Team Culture\nHere at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.\n\nWork\u002FLife Balance\nWe value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.\n\nMentorship & Career Growth\nWe’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.\n\nBASIC QUALIFICATIONS\n\n- 5+ years of non-internship professional software development experience\n- 5+ years of programming with at least one software programming language experience\n- 4+ years of leading design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience\n- Experience as a mentor, tech lead or leading an engineering team\n- Strong background in database system internals and query processing fundamentals\n\nPREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS\n\n- 2+ years of experience with query optimizer architectures, cost based optimizers in OLTP database engines\n\nAmazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status.\n\nLos Angeles County applicants: Job duties for this position include: work safely and cooperatively with other employees, supervisors, and staff; adhere to standards of excellence despite stressful conditions; communicate effectively and respectfully with employees, supervisors, and staff to ensure exceptional customer service; and follow all federal, state, and local laws and Company policies. Criminal history may have a direct, adverse, and negative relationship with some of the material job duties of this position. These include the duties and responsibilities listed above, as well as the abilities to adhere to company policies, exercise sound judgment, effectively manage stress and work safely and respectfully with others, exhibit trustworthiness and professionalism, and safeguard business operations and the Company’s reputation. Pursuant to the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records.\n\nOur inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https:\u002F\u002Famazon.jobs\u002Fcontent\u002Fen\u002Fhow-we-hire\u002Faccommodations for more information. If the country\u002Fregion you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.\n\nOur compensation reflects the cost of labor across several US geographic markets. The base pay for this position ranges from $151,300\u002Fyear in our lowest geographic market up to $261,500\u002Fyear in our highest geographic market. Pay is based on a number of factors including market location and may vary depending on job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Amazon is a total compensation company. Dependent on the position offered, equity, sign-on payments, and other forms of compensation may be provided as part of a total compensation package, in addition to a full range of medical, financial, and\u002For other benefits. For more information, please visit https:\u002F\u002Fwww.aboutamazon.com\u002Fworkplace\u002Femployee-benefits. This position will remain posted until filled. Applicants should apply via our internal or external career $shouldQuerySavedJob: Boolean!, $shouldQueryTitleNorm: Boolean!, $shouldQueryCompanyFields: Boolean!, $shouldQuerySalary: Boolean!, $shouldQueryIndeedApplyLink: Boolean!, $shouldQueryParentEmployer: Boolean!, $shouldQuerySentiment: Boolean!, $shouldIncludeFragmentZone: Boolean!, $shouldQueryMatchComparison: Boolean!, $shouldQueryApplicantInsights: Boolean!, $shouldQueryContactEmail: Boolean!, $shouldQueryEmployerOutreachEngagements: Boolean! = false, $shouldQueryApplyRateLimit: Boolean! = false, $shouldQueryJapanInternshipMetadata: Boolean! = false, $source: String!, $mobvjtk: String!, $continueUrl: String!, $spn: Boolean!, $jobDataInput: JobDataInput!, $resumeEngagementsAfter: String = null, $resumeEngagementsInput: FindResumeEngagementsInput! = {}, $clientMeta: String) {\n  jobData(input: $jobDataInput) {\n    __typename\n    results {\n      __typename\n      trackingKey\n      job {\n        __typename\n        key\n        ...jobDataFields\n        ...titleNormFields@include(if: $shouldQueryTitleNorm)\n        ...savedJobFields@include(if: $shouldQuerySavedJob)\n        ...companyFields@include(if: $shouldQueryCompanyFields)\n        ...parentEmployerFields@include(if: $shouldQueryParentEmployer)\n        jobSearchMobileMigrationData @include(if: $shouldQuerySentiment) {\n          __typename\n          knownUserSentimentIdMap {\n            __typename\n            id\n            suid\n          }\n          userStringDislikedPreferences {\n            __typename\n            uid\n          }\n          userMinimumPayPreferences {\n            __typename\n            currency\n            payAmount\n            salaryType\n          }\n          preferencesFetchStatus\n          paySentiment\n        }\n        jobTypes: attributes(customClass: \"BM62A\") {\n          __typename\n          key\n          label\n          sentiment @include(if: $shouldQuerySentiment)\n        }\n        shiftAndSchedule: attributes(customClass: \"BTSWR\") {\n          __typename\n          key\n          label\n          sentiment @include(if: $shouldQuerySentiment)\n        }\n        compensation @include(if: $shouldQuerySalary) {\n          __typename\n          key\n        }\n        indeedApply @include(if: $shouldQueryIndeedApplyLink) {\n          __typename\n          applyLink(property: INDEED, trackingKeys: {mobvjtk : $mobvjtk}, continueUrl: $continueUrl, spn: $spn, clientMeta: $clientMeta, source: $source) {\n            __typename\n            url\n            iaUid\n          }\n        }\n        ...japanInternshipFields@include(if: $shouldQueryJapanInternshipMetadata)\n        ...ViewJobFragmentZone@include(if: $shouldIncludeFragmentZone)\n        applicants @include(if: $shouldQueryApplicantInsights) {\n          __typename\n          hasInsights\n          ...ApplicantDemographicsFields\n        }\n      }\n      matchComparisonResult @include(if: $shouldQueryMatchComparison) {\n        __typename\n        attributeComparisons {\n          __typename\n          jobProvenance\n          attribute {\n            __typename\n            interestedParty\n            label\n            lastModified\n            suid\n            profileAttributeTypeSuid\n          }\n          jobRequirementStrength\n          jsProvenance\n          matchType\n        }\n        encouragementToApply {\n          __typename\n          score\n          strategy\n          trafficLight\n        }\n        occupationComparisons {\n          __typename\n          jsProvenance\n          matchType\n          occupation {\n            __typename\n            label\n            suid\n          }\n        }\n        attributeIdsMapping {\n          __typename\n          id\n          suid\n          sentiment\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  cogsCheckEligibility(input: {jobKey : $jobKeyString}) @include(if: $shouldQueryCogsEligibility) {\n    __typename\n    error\n    isEligible\n  }\n  jobSeekerProfile @include(if: $shouldQueryApplicantInsights) {\n    __typename\n    profile {\n      __typename\n      subscription {\n        __typename\n        status\n      }\n      jsProPremiumAccess {\n        __typename\n        applicantInsights {\n          __typename\n          access\n          branding\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  findResumeEngagements(first: 50, after: $resumeEngagementsAfter, input: $resumeEngagementsInput) @include(if: $shouldQueryEmployerOutreachEngagements) {\n    __typename\n    engagements {\n      __typename\n      id\n      sender {\n        __typename\n        name\n        email\n        id\n      }\n      status\n      createdDate\n      type\n      recipient {\n        __typename\n        id\n        email\n        phoneNumber\n      }\n      job {\n        __typename\n        title\n        company\n        description\n        employerJobId\n        htmlDescription\n      }\n      conversation {\n        __typename\n        key\n        initialMessage {\n          __typename\n          id\n          textBody\n          htmlBody\n        }\n      }\n      statusHistory {\n        __typename\n        status\n        timestamp\n        modifiedDate\n      }\n      feedback {\n        __typename\n        declineReason\n        comment\n      }\n      fullApplyRequested\n    }\n  }\n  assessRiskForContexts(input: {contexts : [JS_APPLY_START_RATE_LIMIT]}) @include(if: $shouldQueryApplyRateLimit) {\n    __typename\n    action\n    limitInfo {\n      __typename\n      limit\n      remaining\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nfragment jobDataFields on Job {\n  __typename\n  title\n  sourceEmployerName\n  datePublished\n  expired\n  language\n  normalizedTitle\n  refNum\n  expirationDate\n  sponsoredEmployerKey\n  tracking {\n    __typename\n    jobClick {\n      __typename\n      url\n    }\n  }\n  source {\n    __typename\n    key\n    name\n  }\n  feed {\n    __typename\n    key\n    isDradis\n    feedSourceType\n  }\n  url\n  dateOnIndeed\n  description {\n    __typename\n    html\n    text\n    semanticSegments {\n      __typename\n      content\n      header\n      label\n    }\n  }\n  location {\n    __typename\n    countryCode\n    admin1Code\n    admin1Name\n    admin2Code\n    admin2Name\n    admin3Code\n    admin3Name\n    admin4Code\n    admin4Name\n    city\n    postalCode\n    latitude\n    longitude\n    streetAddress\n    fullAddress\n    formatted {\n      __typename\n      long\n      short\n    }\n  }\n  occupations {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  occupationMostLikelySuids: occupations(occupationOption: MOST_LIKELY) {\n    __typename\n    key\n  }\n  benefits: attributes(customClass: \"SXMYH\") {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  socialInsurance: attributes(customClass: \"KTQQ7\") {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  workingSystem: attributes(customClass: \"TY4DY\") {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  requiredDocumentsCategorizedAttributes: attributes(customClass: \"PQCTE\") {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  indeedApply {\n    __typename\n    key\n    scopes\n  }\n  attributes {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  employerProvidedAttributes: attributes(sources: [EMPLOYER]) {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  employerProvidedOccupations: occupations(sources: [EMPLOYER], occupationOption: MOST_SPECIFIC) {\n    __typename\n    label\n  }\n  hiringDemand {\n    __typename\n    isUrgentHire\n    isHighVolumeHiring\n  }\n  thirdPartyTrackingUrls\n  jobSearchMobileMigrationData {\n    __typename\n    advertiserId\n    jobTypeId\n    applyEmail\n    applyUrl\n    contactEmail @include(if: $shouldQueryContactEmail)\n    contactPhone\n    isNoUniqueUrl\n    urlRewriteRule\n    mapDisplayType\n    jobTags\n    locCountry\n    waldoVisibilityLevel\n    isKnownSponsoredOnDesktop\n    isKnownSponsoredOnMobile\n    tpiaAdvNum\n    tpiaApiToken\n    tpiaCoverLetter\n    tpiaEmail\n    tpiaFinishAppUrl\n    tpiaJobCompanyName\n    tpiaJobId\n    tpiaJobLocation\n    tpiaJobMeta\n    tpiaJobTitle\n    tpiaLocale\n    tpiaName\n    tpiaPhone\n    tpiaPostUrl\n    tpiaPresent\n    tpiaResume\n    tpiaResumeFieldsOptional\n    tpiaResumeFieldsRequired\n    tpiaScreenerQuestions\n    iaVisibility\n    hasPreciseLocation\n    algoKey\n  }\n  jobStats {\n    __typename\n    organicApplyStarts\n  }\n  isRepost\n  isLatestPost\n  isPlacement\n  photos {\n    __typename\n    w400\n    w800\n    w1600\n    altText\n  }\n}\n\nfragment titleNormFields on Job {\n  __typename\n  normalizedTitle\n  displayTitle\n}\n\nfragment savedJobFields on Job {\n  __typename\n  savedJob {\n    __typename\n    state\n    currentStateTime\n    applicationDraft {\n      __typename\n      expiryTime\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nfragment companyFields on Job {\n  __typename\n  employer {\n    __typename\n    key\n    tier\n    relativeCompanyPageUrl\n    dossier {\n      __typename\n      images {\n        __typename\n        rectangularLogoUrl\n        headerImageUrls {\n          __typename\n          url1960x400\n        }\n        squareLogoUrls {\n          __typename\n          url256\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    ugcStats {\n      __typename\n      globalReviewCount\n      ratings {\n        __typename\n        overallRating {\n          __typename\n          count\n          value\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nfragment parentEmployerFields on Job {\n  __typename\n  employer {\n    __typename\n    subsidiaryOptOutStatusV2\n    parentEmployer {\n      __typename\n      name\n      subsidiaryOptOutStatusV2\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nfragment japanInternshipFields on Job {\n  __typename\n  internship {\n    __typename\n    periodRange {\n      __typename\n      periodMin\n      periodMax\n    }\n    startMonth {\n      __typename\n      year\n      month\n    }\n  }\n  applicationDueDate\n  graduationYear\n  programType: attributes(keys: [\"XZD3C\", \"BWM3E\"], sources: [EMPLOYER]) {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n}\n\nfragment ViewJobFragmentZone on Job {\n  key\n  __typename\n}\n\nfragment ApplicantDemographicsFields on Applicants {\n  __typename\n  count {\n    __typename\n    total\n    last24h\n  }\n  workExperience {\n    __typename\n    title\n    pct\n  }\n  education {\n    __typename\n    title\n    pct\n  }\n  skills {\n    __typename\n    title\n    pct\n  }\n  certificates {\n    __typename\n    title\n    pct\n  }\n  previewInsight {\n    __typename\n    title\n    pct\n This is not directly reported by employers.\n\nNote that many employers are required by law to consider applicants with criminal histories. Check state and local laws for more about job seeker rights."}]}],"interactivePreferenceCollectionTst":-1,"isJobDetailPreferenceCollectionEnabled":false,"isJobDetailsShiftPreferenceCollectionEnabled":false,"isJobExpired":false,"isMobPreferenceMatchVJActive":true,"isSimpleVJImproveActive":true,"jobTypes":[{"customClassLabels":[],"customClassSuids":[],"label":"Full-time","sentiment":"UNKNOWN","suid":"CF3CP"}],"salaryInfoModel":null,"segmentPreferences":[],"shifts":null,"shiftsAndSchedule":null,"title":"Job details"},"order":["JOB_DETAILS","QUALIFICATIONS"],"qualificationsSectionModel":null},"jobInfoHeaderModel":{"companyImagesModel":{"ejiBannerAsBackground":false,"enhancedJobDescription":false,"featuredEmployer":false,"headerImageUrl":"https:\u002F\u002Fd2q79iu7y748jz.cloudfront.net\u002Fs\u002F_headerimage\u002F1960x400\u002Fd5451ebe056c123ae680950a189ba784","logoAltText":"Amazon Development Center U.S., Inc. logo","logoImageOverlayLower":false,"logoUrl":"https:\u002F\u002Fd2q79iu7y748jz.cloudfront.net\u002Fs\u002F_squarelogo\u002F256x256\u002F744e8603d216350c9c1d21837f2ed7a6","showBannerTop":false,"showEnhancedJobImp":false,"showIconInTitle":false,"showJpBrandLogo":false},"companyName":"Amazon Development Center U.S., Inc.","companyOverviewLink":"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.indeed.com\u002Fcmp\u002FAmazon-Web-Services-05cb4ad1?campaignid=mobvjcmp&from=mobviewjob&tk=1jo98baalg19g801&fromjk=25751d30a508d830","companyReviewLink":"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.indeed.com\u002Fcmp\u002FAmazon-Web-Services-05cb4ad1\u002Freviews?campaignid=mobvjcmp&cmpratingc=mobviewjob&from=mobviewjob&tk=1jo98baalg19g801&fromjk=25751d30a508d830&jt=Senior+Software+Engineer+-+Query+Processing%2C+Aurora+DSQL","companyReviewModel":{"companyName":"Amazon Development Center U.S., Inc.","desktopCompanyLink":"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.indeed.com\u002Fcmp\u002FAmazon-Web-Services-05cb4ad1\u002Freviews?campaignid=viewjob&cmpratingc=mobviewjob&from=viewjob&tk=1jo98baalg19g801&fromjk=25751d30a508d830&jt=Senior+Software+Engineer+-+Query+Processing%2C+Aurora+DSQL","mobileCompanyLink":"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.indeed.com\u002Fcmp\u002FAmazon-Web-Services-05cb4ad1\u002Freviews?campaignid=mobvjcmp&cmpratingc=mobviewjob&from=mobviewjob&tk=1jo98baalg19g801&fromjk=25751d30a508d830&jt=Senior+Software+Engineer+-+Query+Processing%2C+Aurora+DSQL","navigableContainerModel":{"contentHtml":null,"hasBorderBottom":true,"hasBorderTop":true,"href":null,"isRTL":false},"ratingsModel":{"ariaContent":"3.4 out of 5 stars. Link to 571 company reviews (opens in a new tab)","count":571,"countContent":"571 reviews","descriptionContent":"Read what people are saying about working here.","rating":3.4,"showCount":true,"showDescription":true,"size":null}},"employerActivity":null,"employerProvidedOccupations":[],"employerResponsiveCardModel":null,"encryptedFccCompanyId":null,"formattedLocation":"East Palo Alto, CA","hideRating":false,"isCondensedRating":true,"isDesktopApplyButtonSticky":false,"isSimpleVjImproveActive":true,"isSimplifiedHeader":false,"jobFlairLabelModel":null,"jobNormTitle":null,"jobTitle":"Senior Software Engineer - Query Processing, Aurora DSQL","jobTypes":null,"location":null,"openCompanyLinksInNewTab":false,"parentCompanyName":"Amazon.com","ratingsModel":null,"recentSearch":null,"remoteLocation":false,"remoteWorkModel":null,"salaryCurrency":null,"salaryMax":null,"salaryMin":null,"salaryType":null,"subtitle":"Amazon Development Center U.S., Inc. - East Palo Alto, CA","tagModels":null,"taxonomyAttributes":null,"viewJobDisplay":"DESKTOP_EMBEDDED"},"jobMetadataHeaderModel":{"jobType":"Full-time"},"jobTagModel":null,"resumeEvaluationResult":null,"sanitizedJobDescription":"\u003Cdiv>\n \u003Ch2>\u003Cb>DESCRIPTION\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fh2>\n \u003Cp>Amazon Aurora DSQL is a serverless, distributed SQL database with virtually unlimited scale, highest availability, and zero infrastructure management. Aurora DSQL provides active-active high availability, providing strong data consistency designed for 99.99% single-Region and 99.999% multi-Region availability. Aurora DSQL automatically manages and scales system resources, so you don't have to worry about maintenance downtime and provisioning, patching, or upgrading infrastructure.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   We are seeking an engineer to enhance the query optimization and execution layer of Aurora DSQL. The role focuses on designing and implementing query optimization algorithms, cost-based optimization strategies, and core execution engine improvements. The ideal candidate has deep experience with database system internals and query optimizer architectures.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   AWS Utility Computing (UC) provides product innovations — from foundational services such as Amazon’s Simple Storage Service (S3) and Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2), to consistently released new product innovations that continue to set AWS’s services and features apart in the industry. As a member of the UC organization, you’ll support the development and management of Compute, Database, Storage, Internet of Things (Iot), Platform, and Productivity Apps services in AWS, including support for customers who require specialized security solutions for their cloud services.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   Key job responsibilities\u003Cbr>\n   Our engineers collaborate across diverse teams, projects, and environments to have a firsthand impact on our global customer base. You’ll bring a passion for innovation, data, search, analytics, and distributed systems. You’ll also:\u003Cbr>\n   Solve challenging technical problems, often ones not solved before, at every layer of the stack.\u003Cbr>\n   Design, implement, test, deploy and maintain innovative software solutions to transform service performance, durability, cost, and security.\u003Cbr>\n   Build high-quality, highly available, always-on products.\u003Cbr>\n   Research implementations that deliver the best possible experiences for customers.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   A day in the life\u003Cbr>\n   As you design and code solutions to help our team drive efficiencies in software architecture, you’ll create metrics, implement automation and other improvements, and resolve the root cause of software defects. You’ll also:\u003Cbr>\n   Build high-impact solutions to deliver to our large customer base.\u003Cbr>\n   Participate in design discussions, code review, and communicate with internal and external stakeholders.\u003Cbr>\n   Work cross-functionally to help drive business decisions with your technical input.\u003Cbr>\n   Work in a startup-like development environment, where you’re always working on the most important stuff.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   About the team\u003Cbr>\n   Our team is dedicated to supporting new members. We have a broad mix of experience levels and tenures, and we’re building an environment that celebrates knowledge-sharing and mentorship. Our senior members enjoy one-on-one mentoring and thorough, but kind, code reviews. We care about your career growth and strive to assign projects that help our team members develop your engineering expertise so you feel empowered to take on more complex tasks in the future.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   Diverse Experiences\u003Cbr>\n   AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   About AWS\u003Cbr>\n   Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   Inclusive Team Culture\u003Cbr>\n   Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   Work\u002FLife Balance\u003Cbr>\n   We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   Mentorship &amp; Career Growth\u003Cbr>\n   We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Ch2>\u003Cb>\u003Cbr>\n    BASIC QUALIFICATIONS\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fh2>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>5+ years of non-internship professional software development experience\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>5+ years of programming with at least one software programming language experience\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>4+ years of leading design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Experience as a mentor, tech lead or leading an engineering team\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Strong background in database system internals and query processing fundamentals\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Ch2>\u003Cb> PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fh2>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>2+ years of experience with query optimizer architectures, cost based optimizers in OLTP database engines\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cbr>\n  Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. \n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cbr>\n  Los Angeles County applicants: Job duties for this position include: work safely and cooperatively with other employees, supervisors, and staff; adhere to standards of excellence despite stressful conditions; communicate effectively and respectfully with employees, supervisors, and staff to ensure exceptional customer service; and follow all federal, state, and local laws and Company policies. Criminal history may have a direct, adverse, and negative relationship with some of the material job duties of this position. These include the duties and responsibilities listed above, as well as the abilities to adhere to company policies, exercise sound judgment, effectively manage stress and work safely and respectfully with others, exhibit trustworthiness and professionalism, and safeguard business operations and the Company’s reputation. Pursuant to the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. \n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cbr>\n  Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https:\u002F\u002Famazon.jobs\u002Fcontent\u002Fen\u002Fhow-we-hire\u002Faccommodations for more information. If the country\u002Fregion you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner. \n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cbr>\n  Our compensation reflects the cost of labor across several US geographic markets. The base pay for this position ranges from $151,300\u002Fyear in our lowest geographic market up to $261,500\u002Fyear in our highest geographic market. Pay is based on a number of factors including market location and may vary depending on job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Amazon is a total compensation company. Dependent on the position offered, equity, sign-on payments, and other forms of compensation may be provided as part of a total compensation package, in addition to a full range of medical, financial, and\u002For other benefits. For more information, please visit https:\u002F\u002Fwww.aboutamazon.com\u002Fworkplace\u002Femployee-benefits. This position will remain posted until filled. Applicants should apply via our internal or external career site.\n\u003C\u002Fdiv>","showExpiredHeader":false,"structuredDataJobSummaryModel":null,"tagModels":null,"viewJobDisplay":"DESKTOP_EMBEDDED"},"sectionedJobInfoModel":null},"jobKey":"25751d30a508d830","jobLanguage":"en","jobLocation":"East Palo Alto, CA","jobMetadataFooterModel":{"advertiserName":"","age":"Just .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs{box-sizing:border-box;background:none;appearance:none;text-align:start;text-decoration:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;margin-block-start:0;margin-block-end:0;margin-inline-start:0;margin-inline-end:0;padding-inline-start:1rem;padding-inline-end:1rem;line-height:1.5;font-family:'Indeed 1);display:inline-flex;inline-size:auto;padding-block-start:0.5625rem;padding-block-end:0.5625rem;min-block-size:2.75rem;color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs::-moz-focus-inner{border:0;}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs[aria-disabled='true']{cursor:default;}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:visited{color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs{box-sizing:border-box;background:none;appearance:none;text-align:start;text-decoration:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;margin-block-start:0;margin-block-end:0;margin-inline-start:0;margin-inline-end:0;padding-inline-start:1rem;padding-inline-end:1rem;line-height:1.5;font-family:\\u0027Indeed Inc.","desktopCompanyLink":"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.indeed.com\u002Fcmp\u002FAmazon-Web-Services-05cb4ad1\u002Freviews?campaignid=viewjob&cmpratingc=mobviewjob&from=viewjob&tk=1jo98baalg19g801&fromjk=25751d30a508d830&jt=Senior+Software+Engineer+-+Query+Processing%2C+Aurora+DSQL","mobileCompanyLink":"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.indeed.com\u002Fcmp\u002FAmazon-Web-Services-05cb4ad1\u002Freviews?campaignid=mobvjcmp&cmpratingc=mobviewjob&from=mobviewjob&tk=1jo98baalg19g801&fromjk=25751d30a508d830&jt=Senior+Software+Engineer+-+Query+Processing%2C+Aurora+DSQL","navigableContainerModel":{"contentHtml":null,"hasBorderBottom":true,"hasBorderTop":true,"href":null,"isRTL":false},"ratingsModel":{"ariaContent":"3.4 Link to 571 company reviews (opens in a new tab)","count":571,"countContent":"571 reviews","descriptionContent":"Read what people are saying about working here.","rating":3.4,"showCount":true,"showDescription":true,"size":null}},"employerActivity":null,"employerProvidedOccupations":[],"employerResponsiveCardModel":null,"encryptedFccCompanyId":null,"formattedLocation":"East Palo Alto, CA","hideRating":false,"isCondensedRating":true,"isDesktopApplyButtonSticky":false,"isSimpleVjImproveActive":true,"isSimplifiedHeader":false,"jobFlairLabelModel":null,"jobNormTitle":null,"jobTitle":"Senior Software Engineer - Query Processing, Aurora DSQL","jobTypes":null,"location":null,"openCompanyLinksInNewTab":false,"parentCompanyName":"Amazon.com","ratingsModel":null,"recentSearch":null,"remoteLocation":false,"remoteWorkModel":null,"salaryCurrency":null,"salaryMax":null,"salaryMin":null,"salaryType":null,"subtitle":"Amazon Development Center U.S., Inc. - East Palo Alto, CA","tagModels":null,"taxonomyAttributes":null,"viewJobDisplay":"DESKTOP_EMBEDDED"},"jobMetadataHeaderModel":{"jobType":"Full-time"},"jobTagModel":null,"resumeEvaluationResult":null,"sanitizedJobDescription":"\u003Cdiv>\n \u003Ch2>\u003Cb>DESCRIPTION\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fh2>\n \u003Cp>Amazon Aurora DSQL is a serverless, distributed SQL database with virtually unlimited scale, highest availability, and zero infrastructure management. Aurora DSQL provides active-active high availability, providing strong data consistency designed for 99.99% single-Region and 99.999% multi-Region availability. Aurora DSQL automatically manages and scales system resources, so you don't have to worry about maintenance downtime and provisioning, patching, or upgrading infrastructure.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   We are seeking an engineer to enhance the query optimization and execution layer of Aurora DSQL. The role focuses on designing and implementing query optimization algorithms, cost-based optimization strategies, and core execution engine improvements. The ideal candidate has deep experience with database system internals and query optimizer architectures.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   AWS Utility Computing (UC) provides product innovations — from foundational services such as Amazon’s Simple Storage Service (S3) and Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2), to consistently released new product innovations that continue to set AWS’s services and features apart in the industry. As a member of the UC organization, you’ll support the development and management of Compute, Database, Storage, Internet of Things (Iot), Platform, and Productivity Apps services in AWS, including support for customers who require specialized security solutions for their cloud services.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   Key job responsibilities\u003Cbr>\n   Our engineers collaborate across diverse teams, projects, and environments to have a firsthand impact on our global customer base. You’ll bring a passion for innovation, data, search, analytics, and distributed systems. You’ll also:\u003Cbr>\n   Solve challenging technical problems, often ones not solved before, at every layer of the stack.\u003Cbr>\n   Design, implement, test, deploy and maintain innovative software solutions to transform service performance, durability, cost, and security.\u003Cbr>\n   Build high-quality, highly available, always-on products.\u003Cbr>\n   Research implementations that deliver the best possible experiences for customers.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   A day in the life\u003Cbr>\n   As you design and code solutions to help our team drive efficiencies in software architecture, you’ll create metrics, implement automation and other improvements, and resolve the root cause of software defects. You’ll also:\u003Cbr>\n   Build high-impact solutions to deliver to our large customer base.\u003Cbr>\n   Participate in design discussions, code review, and communicate with internal and external stakeholders.\u003Cbr>\n   Work cross-functionally to help drive business decisions with your technical input.\u003Cbr>\n   Work in a startup-like development environment, where you’re always working on the most important stuff.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   About the team\u003Cbr>\n   Our team is dedicated to supporting new members. We have a broad mix of experience levels and tenures, and we’re building an environment that celebrates knowledge-sharing and mentorship. Our senior members enjoy one-on-one mentoring and thorough, but kind, code reviews. We care about your career growth and strive to assign projects that help our team members develop your engineering expertise so you feel empowered to take on more complex tasks in the future.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   Diverse Experiences\u003Cbr>\n   AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   About AWS\u003Cbr>\n   Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   Inclusive Team Culture\u003Cbr>\n   Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   Work\u002FLife Balance\u003Cbr>\n   We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.\u003Cbr>\u003Cbr>\n   Mentorship &amp; Career Growth\u003Cbr>\n   We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Ch2>\u003Cb>\u003Cbr>\n    BASIC QUALIFICATIONS\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fh2>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>5+ years of non-internship professional software development experience\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>5+ years of programming with at least one software programming language experience\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>4+ years of leading design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Experience as a mentor, tech lead or leading an engineering team\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Strong background in database system internals and query processing fundamentals\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Ch2>\u003Cb> PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fh2>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>2+ years of experience with query optimizer architectures, cost based optimizers in OLTP database engines\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cbr>\n  Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. \n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cbr>\n  Los Angeles County applicants: Job duties for this position include: work safely and cooperatively with other employees, supervisors, and staff; adhere to standards of excellence despite stressful conditions; communicate effectively and respectfully with employees, supervisors, and staff to ensure exceptional customer service; and follow all federal, state, and local laws and Company policies. Criminal history may have a direct, adverse, and negative relationship with some of the material job duties of this position. These include the duties and responsibilities listed above, as well as the abilities to adhere to company policies, exercise sound judgment, effectively manage stress and work safely and respectfully with others, exhibit trustworthiness and professionalism, and safeguard business operations and the Company’s reputation. Pursuant to the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. \n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cbr>\n  Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https:\u002F\u002Famazon.jobs\u002Fcontent\u002Fen\u002Fhow-we-hire\u002Faccommodations for more information. If the country\u002Fregion you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner. \n \u003Cbr>\n \u003Cbr>\n  Our compensation reflects the cost of labor across several US geographic markets. The base pay for this position ranges from $151,300\u002Fyear in our lowest geographic market up to $261,500\u002Fyear in our highest geographic market. Pay is based on a number of factors including market location and may vary depending on job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Amazon is a total compensation company. Dependent on the position offered, equity, sign-on payments, and other forms of compensation may be provided as part of a total compensation package, in addition to a full range of medical, financial, and\u002For other benefits. For more information, please visit https:\u002F\u002Fwww.aboutamazon.com\u002Fworkplace\u002Femployee-benefits. This position will remain posted until filled. Applicants should apply via our internal or external career site.\n\u003C\u002Fdiv>","showExpiredHeader":false,"structuredDataJobSummaryModel":null,"tagModels":null,"viewJobDisplay":"DESKTOP_EMBEDDED"},"sectionedJobInfoModel":null},"mobtk":"1jo98ba03g19g800","profileBaseUrl":"https:\u002F\u002Fprofile.indeed.com","rtl":false,"salaryInfoModel":{"featureTokens":[],"matchingSalary":false,"minimumPayPreferencePresent":false,"salaryCurrency":"USD","salaryLabel":{"scope":null,"usefulPercent":null},"salaryMax":261500,"salaryMin":151300,"salarySource":"EXTRACTION","salaryText":"$151,300 - $261,500 a year","salaryTextFormatted":false,"salaryType":"YEARLY","userMinimumPayAmount":null,"userMinimumPaySalaryType":null}},"resumeWordCount":0,"jobDescription":"\u003Cdiv>\u003Ch2 class=\"jobSectionHeader\">\u003Cb>DESCRIPTION\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fh2>\u003Cp>\nAmazon Aurora DSQL is a serverless, distributed SQL database with virtually unlimited scale, highest availability, and zero infrastructure management. Aurora DSQL provides active-active high availability, providing strong data consistency designed for 99.99% single-Region and 99.999% multi-Region availability. Aurora DSQL automatically manages and scales system resources, so you don't have to worry about maintenance downtime and provisioning, patching, or upgrading infrastructure.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nWe are seeking an engineer to enhance the query optimization and execution layer of Aurora DSQL. The role focuses on designing and implementing query optimization algorithms, cost-based optimization strategies, and core execution engine improvements. The ideal candidate has deep experience with database system internals and query optimizer architectures.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nAWS Utility Computing (UC) provides product innovations &mdash; from foundational services such as Amazon&rsquo;s Simple Storage Service (S3) and Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2), to consistently released new product innovations that continue to set AWS&rsquo;s services and features apart in the industry. As a member of the UC organization, you&rsquo;ll support the development and management of Compute, Database, Storage, Internet of Things (Iot), Platform, and Productivity Apps services in AWS, including support for customers who require specialized security solutions for their cloud services.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nKey job responsibilities\u003Cbr>\nOur engineers collaborate across diverse teams, projects, and environments to have a firsthand impact on our global customer base. You&rsquo;ll bring a passion for innovation, data, search, analytics, and distributed systems. You&rsquo;ll also:\u003Cbr>\nSolve challenging technical problems, often ones not solved before, at every layer of the stack.\u003Cbr>\nDesign, implement, test, deploy and maintain innovative software solutions to transform service performance, durability, cost, and security.\u003Cbr>\nBuild high-quality, highly available, always-on products.\u003Cbr>\nResearch implementations that deliver the best possible experiences for customers.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nA day in the life\u003Cbr>\nAs you design and code solutions to help our team drive efficiencies in software architecture, you&rsquo;ll create metrics, implement automation and other improvements, and resolve the root cause of software defects. You&rsquo;ll also:\u003Cbr>\nBuild high-impact solutions to deliver to our large customer base.\u003Cbr>\nParticipate in design discussions, code review, and communicate with internal and external stakeholders.\u003Cbr>\nWork cross-functionally to help drive business decisions with your technical input.\u003Cbr>\nWork in a startup-like development environment, where you&rsquo;re always working on the most important stuff.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nAbout the team\u003Cbr>\nOur team is dedicated to supporting new members. We have a broad mix of experience levels and tenures, and we&rsquo;re building an environment that celebrates knowledge-sharing and mentorship. Our senior members enjoy one-on-one mentoring and thorough, but kind, code reviews. We care about your career growth and strive to assign projects that help our team members develop your engineering expertise so you feel empowered to take on more complex tasks in the future.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nDiverse Experiences\u003Cbr>\nAWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn&rsquo;t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don&rsquo;t let it stop you from applying.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nAbout AWS\u003Cbr>\nAmazon Web Services (AWS) is the world&rsquo;s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating &mdash; that&rsquo;s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nInclusive Team Culture\u003Cbr>\nHere at AWS, it&rsquo;s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nWork\u002FLife Balance\u003Cbr>\nWe value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there&rsquo;s nothing we can&rsquo;t achieve in the cloud.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nMentorship &amp; Career Growth\u003Cbr>\nWe&rsquo;re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth&rsquo;s Best Employer. That&rsquo;s why you&rsquo;ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Ch2 class=\"jobSectionHeader\">\u003Cb>\u003Cbr>\nBASIC QUALIFICATIONS\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fh2>\u003Cul>\u003Cli>5+ years of non-internship professional software development experience\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>5+ years of programming with at least one software programming language experience\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>4+ years of leading design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>Experience as a mentor, tech lead or leading an engineering team\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>Strong background in database system internals and query processing fundamentals\u003C\u002Fli>\u003C\u002Ful>\u003Ch2 class=\"jobSectionHeader\">\u003Cb>\nPREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fh2>\u003Cul>\u003Cli>2+ years of experience with query optimizer architectures, cost based optimizers in OLTP database engines\u003C\u002Fli>\u003C\u002Ful>\u003Cbr>\nAmazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nLos Angeles County applicants: Job duties for this position include: work safely and cooperatively with other employees, supervisors, and staff; adhere to standards of excellence despite stressful conditions; communicate effectively and respectfully with employees, supervisors, and staff to ensure exceptional customer service; and follow all federal, state, and local laws and Company policies. Criminal history may have a direct, adverse, and negative relationship with some of the material job duties of this position. These include the duties and responsibilities listed above, as well as the abilities to adhere to company policies, exercise sound judgment, effectively manage stress and work safely and respectfully with others, exhibit trustworthiness and professionalism, and safeguard business operations and the Company&rsquo;s reputation. Pursuant to the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nOur inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https:\u002F\u002Famazon.jobs\u002Fcontent\u002Fen\u002Fhow-we-hire\u002Faccommodations for more information. If the country\u002Fregion you&rsquo;re applying in isn&rsquo;t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nOur compensation reflects the cost of labor across several US geographic markets. The base pay for this position ranges from $151,300\u002Fyear in our lowest geographic market up to $261,500\u002Fyear in our highest geographic market. Pay is based on a number of factors including market location and may vary depending on job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Amazon is a total compensation company. Development Center U.S., Inc.","desktopCompanyLink":"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.indeed.com\u002Fcmp\u002FAmazon-Web-Services-05cb4ad1\u002Freviews?campaignid=viewjob&cmpratingc=mobviewjob&from=viewjob&tk=1jo98baalg19g801&fromjk=25751d30a508d830&jt=Senior+Software+Engineer+-+Query+Processing%2C+Aurora+DSQL","mobileCompanyLink":"https:\u002F\u002Fwww.indeed.com\u002Fcmp\u002FAmazon-Web-Services-05cb4ad1\u002Freviews?campaignid=mobvjcmp&cmpratingc=mobviewjob&from=mobviewjob&tk=1jo98baalg19g801&fromjk=25751d30a508d830&jt=Senior+Software+Engineer+-+Query+Processing%2C+Aurora+DSQL","navigableContainerModel":{"contentHtml":null,"hasBorderBottom":true,"hasBorderTop":true,"href":null,"isRTL":false},"ratingsModel":{"ariaContent":"3.4
